title: Arranging order of a resource dashboard
excerpt: I’ve created a workload widget to display allocation of resource across projects, BAU activity, management tasks, annual leave etc in my department but there’s no way currently to order individuals by teams or alphabetic…

posts.author: dburton4 (Douglas Burton)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve created a workload widget to display allocation of resource across projects, BAU activity, management tasks, annual leave etc in my department but there’s no way currently to order individuals by teams or alphabetical order. It would be nice for this to be added so it’s easier to find busy periods for teams. Thanks

posts.author: zonum (Jose Munoz)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, the only way to half fix it is by sorting the People column in Alphabetical order on each Main Table. This will sort the Boards Grouping in alphabetical order. Is not what you need…but is something.
